requirement_topic.en: Authorized Uruguayan Importer / Local Agent & Spanish Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 授权乌拉圭进口商/当地代理及西班牙语标签
requirement_topic.zht: 授權烏拉圭進口商/當地代理及西班牙語標籤

summary.en: An authorized Uruguayan importer with a valid RUT (Registro Único Tributario) and DGI (Dirección General Impositiva) registration is required to import and commercialize electronic devices in Uruguay. The importer bears regulatory and tax responsibility for the product. Spanish-language labelling is mandatory, including product name, model, manufacturer details, importer name and address, country of origin, technical specifications (voltage, frequency), and the URSEC certificate number and mark. DGA (Dirección Nacional de Aduanas) customs clearance requires commercial invoice, packing list, and applicable certificates.
summary.zh: 在乌拉圭进口和销售电子设备须有持有有效RUT（统一税务登记）及DGI（总税务局）注册的授权乌拉圭进口商。进口商承担产品的监管和税务责任。西班牙语标签为强制要求，须包括产品名称、型号、制造商信息、进口商名称及地址、原产国、技术规格（电压、频率）以及URSEC证书编号和标志。DGA（全国海关局）清关要求商业发票、装箱单及相关证书。
summary.zht: 在烏拉圭進口和銷售電子裝置須有持有有效RUT（統一稅務登記）及DGI（總稅務局）註冊的授權烏拉圭進口商。進口商承擔產品的監管和稅務責任。西班牙語標籤為強制要求，須包括產品名稱、型號、製造商資訊、進口商名稱及地址、原產國、技術規格（電壓、頻率）以及URSEC證書編號和標誌。DGA（全國海關局）清關要求商業發票、裝箱單及相關證書。

standards_or_laws: DGI (Dirección General Impositiva) — RUT registration requirement
DGA (Dirección Nacional de Aduanas) — customs import requirements
Uruguay consumer protection legislation — Spanish labelling obligations

summary.en: For export from China, the Chinese exporter must have import/export trading rights registered with MOFCOM. There is no requirement for a locally registered importer within China for export purposes. The exporter's details appear on the Chinese customs export declaration. Spanish labelling and a Uruguayan local importer are not required in China.
summary.zh: 从中国出口时，中国出口商须持有商务部注册的进出口贸易权。出口目的地在中国境内不要求有本地注册进口商。出口商信息体现在中国海关出口申报单上。中国不要求西班牙语标签和乌拉圭本地进口商。
summary.zht: 從中國出口時，中國出口商須持有商務部註冊的進出口貿易權。出口目的地在中國境內不要求有本地註冊進口商。出口商資訊體現在中國海關出口申報單上。中國不要求西班牙語標籤和烏拉圭本地進口商。

standards_or_laws: China customs export declaration (海关出口报关单)
Chinese product labelling standards (GB 7251 series and product-specific)

gap.en: Full gap. A Uruguayan entity with RUT/DGI registration must be identified as the importer of record before import. Spanish labelling compliant with URSEC certificate display requirements must be applied. Chinese-language-only labelling is not acceptable. DGA customs documentation must be prepared in advance.
gap.zh: 完全差距。进口前须确定一个持有RUT/DGI注册的乌拉圭实体作为记录进口商。须张贴符合URSEC证书展示要求的西班牙语标签。仅有中文标签不可接受。须提前准备DGA海关文件。
gap.zht: 完全差距。進口前須確定一個持有RUT/DGI註冊的烏拉圭實體作為記錄進口商。須張貼符合URSEC證書展示要求的西班牙語標籤。僅有中文標籤不可接受。須提前準備DGA海關文件。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An authorized Uruguayan importer with RUT/DGI registration is mandatory before goods can be imported or sold. Spanish labelling including the URSEC certificate number and importer details is required on each unit. Engage a qualified Uruguayan importer or regulatory agent early in the market-entry process. Verify current DGA customs and DGI registration requirements with qualified local professionals.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 货物进口或销售前须有持有RUT/DGI注册的授权乌拉圭进口商。每台产品须贴有包含URSEC证书编号和进口商信息的西班牙语标签。应在市场准入流程早期确定合格的乌拉圭进口商或监管代理。请与合格的当地专业人士核验现行DGA海关和DGI注册要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 貨物進口或銷售前須有持有RUT/DGI註冊的授權烏拉圭進口商。每台產品須貼有包含URSEC證書編號和進口商資訊的西班牙語標籤。應在市場准入流程早期確定合格的烏拉圭進口商或監管代理。請與合格的當地專業人士核驗現行DGA海關和DGI註冊要求。
